use_codes.desc: TREATMENT OF OSTEOPOROSIS IN POST MENOPAUSAL WOMEN AND/OR THE TREATMENT TO INCREASE BONE MASS IN MEN WITH OSTEOPOROSIS
THE TREATMENT OF OSTEOPOROSIS IN POSTMENOPAUSAL WOMEN AND/OR THE TREATMENT TO INCREASE BONE MASS IN MEN

indications.text:
FOSAMAX PLUS D is indicated for:
1.1 Treatment of osteoporosis in postmenopausal women
For the treatment of osteoporosis, FOSAMAX PLUS D increases bone mass and reduces the
incidence of fractures, including those of the hip and spine (vertebral compression fractures).
